journey.name: Editing Studio
journey.description: Verify that the user can precisely define sections of the recorded video to trim and recover.

actions.action: Verify that the timeline scaling and metadata generation correctly load the local file path.
Open the 'Fine-tune' modal to adjust playback blocks.
Verify that you can adjust playback blocks in tenth-of-a-second increments from 0.0s to 0.9s.
Select specific sections of the video to skip or remove.
Check that the video timeline visual indicates the skipped sections with a red overlay.
Tap 'Preview without Skipped Frames' to play through seamlessly skipping the red marked sections.
Tap 'Save' to trigger native trimming and proceed to the Publishing Studio.
